title: Best Multispeciality Hospital in Bangalore | VSH Hospital
heading: Meet The Leading Doctors In Healthcare
description: VSH Hospital (Vydehi) offers 24/7 emergency care, advanced neurosurgery, and cardiology in Ashok Nagar, Bangalore. Book expert consultations online today.

Our team of expert oncologists works closely with other specialists to develop personalized treatment plans tailored to each patient’s unique needs. By utilizing the latest advancements in cancer care , we aim to improve outcomes while minimizing side effects. From the initial consultation to ongoing follow-up, we are committed to providing comprehensive, compassionate care throughout every patient's cancer journey. Our Services Our Medical Oncology department offers a range of services, including: Day Care Chemotherapy for solid malignancies such as cancers of the breast, lung, colon, stomach, prostate, cervix, head and neck, and more. Day Care Chemotherapy for hematological malignancies like Non-Hodgkin's Lymphoma , Hodgkin's Lymphoma , Multiple Myeloma , and others. Inpatient Facilities for the treatment of hematologic malignancies, including: Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (ALL) Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia (CLL) Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML) Inpatient Facilities for administering neo-adjuvant and adjuvant chemotherapies for bone cancers and soft tissue sarcomas . Immunotherapy and Monoclonal Antibody Treatments for various cancers. HIPEC (Heated Intraperitoneal Chemotherapy) administration for cancers such as ovarian , stomach , colon cancers , and pseudomyxoma peritonei . Intrathecal Chemotherapy Administration for hematological cancers. Hormonal Treatments for cancers like breast and prostate cancers. Bone Marrow Aspiration and Bone Marrow Biopsies . Lumbar Punctures , Abdominal and Thoracic Paracentesis (ascitic and pleural fluid tapping). Chemo Port Usage , Flushing , and Dressing . Our goal is to ensure that every patient receives world-class cancer care in a supportive and compassionate environment, providing the best possible treatment experience. Urology Our Urology Department provides specialized care for a wide range of urinary and reproductive system conditions in both men and women. From kidney stones and urinary tract infections to prostate health and bladder disorders , our team uses advanced diagnostic tools and minimally invasive treatments to ensure the best outcomes. We focus on personalized treatment plans tailored to each patient’s needs, offering services like robotic surgery , laser treatments , and medical management . Committed to improving quality of life, we deliver expert , compassionate care in a supportive environment. Treatments & Procedures Laser Services for Stone and Prostate Stone Disease : PCNL (Percutaneous Nephrolithotomy) RIRS ESWL (Extracorporeal Shock Wave Lithotripsy) URSL (Ureterorenoscopic Lithotripsy) CLT (Cystolithotripsy)/PCCL Laparoscopic Ureterolithotomy/Pyelolithotomy Endourology – Prostate, Bladder, and Stricture Operations TURP/HOLEP (Laser Prostatectomy) TURBT Cystoscopy VIU/OIU DJ Stenting Pediatric Urology Hypospadias Repairs Laparoscopic Orchidopexy Laparoscopic Pyeloplasty Ureteric Reimplantation Vesico-Ureteric Reflux Procedures Posterior Urethral Valve Fulgaration Urooncology Bladder Cancer : Laparoscopic Radical Cystectomy and Neo-Bladder Reconstructions Kidney Cancer : Laparoscopic Radical Nephrectomy/Partial Nephrectomy Prostate Cancer : Laparoscopic Radical Prostatectomy Testis Cancer : Orchidectomy , Assisted Laparoscopic RPLND Penile Cancer : Penectomy and Assisted Video Inguinal Lymph Node Dissection (RA-VIEL) Adrenal Cancers : Assisted Laparoscopic Adrenalectomy Urogynaecology Urinary Incontinence Surgeries : TOT/TVT Repair , VVF , UVF , Artificial Urinary Sphincter Intravesical Botox for OAB Cystocele Repair Reconstructive Urology Urethroplasty (Buccal Mucosal Graft Urethroplasty) Augmentation of Bladder Ureteric Reconstruction Surgeries Andrology (Male Sexual Dysfunction) and Male Infertility Microsurgical Varicocelectomy for Infertility Penile Implants for ED Vascular Access Procedures for Kidney Failure AV Fistula Genitourinary Trauma Care Our team is dedicated to providing comprehensive and innovative care , ensuring the best possible outcomes for all urological conditions. Surgical Gastroenterology Surgical Gastroenterology specializes in the surgical treatment of conditions affecting the digestive system , including the esophagus , stomach , liver , pancreas , intestines , and gallbladder . Our team of experienced surgeons uses advanced , minimally invasive techniques to treat disorders such as gastrointestinal cancers , gallstones , hernias , and inflammatory bowel disease . We prioritize patient safety and recovery , offering personalized treatment plans tailored to each patient’s condition. With state-of-the-art technology and a multidisciplinary approach , we are committed to providing high-quality , compassionate care for all gastrointestinal surgical needs . to providing the most effective , minimally invasive solutions for gastrointestinal health, ensuring improved patient outcomes and faster recovery times. Medical Gastroenterology Medical Gastroenterology focuses on the diagnosis and treatment of digestive system disorders without surgery. Our specialists provide expert care for conditions like acid reflux , irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) , ulcers , liver diseases , and inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) . Utilizing advanced diagnostic techniques such as endoscopy and colonoscopy , we offer personalized , non-invasive treatments to manage and improve digestive health. Our team is dedicated to delivering compassionate , patient-centered care , helping individuals achieve better health and quality of life through comprehensive gastrointestinal care and long-term management . Our Services Colonoscopy ERCP (Endoscopic Retrograde Cholangiopancreatography) Capsule Endoscopy Management of Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) Hepatitis Management Fatty Liver Disease Management Treatment of Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease (GERD) Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) Management GI Bleeding Treatment Biliary Disease Gastrointestinal Cancer Diagnostic CT , MRI , and ultrasound scans Endoscopic Ultrasound (EUS) Gastrointestinal Disease GI Infections Gastrointestinal Hemorrhage Gastroduodenal Manometry Anti-Reflux Surgery Upper Endoscopy Pancreatic Disease 24-Hour pH Testing Liver Scan Hydrogen Breath Test Manometry (test to measure the strength and coordination of GI tract muscles) Minimally Invasive Surgeries Our team is committed to delivering high-quality gastrointestinal care , offering a wide range of services designed to promote better digestive health and overall well-being . Neurology Expert neurologists, advanced diagnostics, 24/7 stroke response, and comprehensive treatment for brain, nerve, and spine disorders. Buttons: Book Appointment Meet Our Neurologists Micro-trust (3 icons): ✓ 24/7 Stroke Care ✓ Advanced Neurodiagnostics ✓ Fellowship-Trained Specialists Comprehensive Neurology Care at VSH Hospital Bangalore The Neurology Department at VSH Hospital provides world-class care for neurological disorders affecting the brain, spinal cord, and peripheral nerves. Our team of neurologists, neurosurgeons, neurophysiologists, radiologists, and rehabilitation experts collaborate to deliver precise diagnoses and evidence-based treatment. With cutting-edge technology and patient-centric care, VSH Hospital is one of the most trusted neurology centres in Bangalore for adults, children, and seniors. Why VSH Hospital Is Among the Best Neurology Hospitals in Bangalore 4–6 Icon Cards: 24/7 Stroke Emergency Unit Advanced Imaging & Neurodiagnostics (EEG, NCV, EMG, MRI, CT) Specialised Epilepsy, Movement Disorder & Headache Clinics Multidisciplinary Team Approach Minimally Invasive & Image-Guided Procedures Dedicated Neuro-Rehabilitation Unit Neurological Conditions We Treat at VSH Bangalore Stroke & Cerebrovascular Disorders We provide rapid treatment for ischemic and hemorrhagic strokes to protect brain function and prevent long-term disability. Our team also manages TIA and carotid artery disease to reduce future stroke risk. Epilepsy & Seizure Disorders We diagnose and treat all seizure types, including focal, generalized, and drug-resistant epilepsy. Advanced monitoring and personalised care help patients achieve better seizure control. Movement Disorders Our specialists manage Parkinson’s disease, tremors, dystonia, and gait issues with tailored treatments that improve mobility and daily function. Headache & Migraine Disorders We offer targeted therapies for migraines, cluster headaches, and chronic tension headaches to provide lasting relief and better symptom control. Neuromuscular & Nerve Disorders We treat neuropathy, myopathy, and motor neuron disease using advanced diagnostic tests to restore strength, sensation, and nerve function. Spine & Radiculopathy We evaluate disc prolapse and nerve compression causing neck, back, or radiating limb pain and offer treatments to relieve pain and improve movement. Paediatric Neurology We provide specialised care for childhood epilepsy, developmental delays, and behavioural concerns with a gentle, family-centered approach. Neuro-Immunology & Autoimmune Disorders We diagnose and manage multiple sclerosis, transverse myelitis, and autoimmune encephalitis to reduce inflammation and stabilise neurological symptoms. Symptoms That Require a Neurology Consultation Severe or recurrent headaches Weakness/numbness in arms or legs Loss of balance, dizziness, or falls Memory loss or behavioural changes Seizures or fainting episodes Tremors or involuntary movements Difficulty speaking, swallowing, or walking Vision disturbances or double vision If you notice any of these symptoms, consult a neurologist immediately for early diagnosis and advanced care. Neurology Hospital Near MG Road, Richmond Town, Koramangala, Indiranagar & Jayanagar VSH Hospital, located on Vittal Mallya Road in Ashok Nagar, is easily accessible from MG Road, Brigade Road, Richmond Town, Ulsoor, Domlur, Indiranagar, Koramangala, Jayanagar, and Basavanagudi. Patients across central and south Bengaluru can reach our Neurology Department quickly for timely consultations and 24/7 stroke and neuro-emergency care. Need Expert Neurology Care? Buttons: Book Neurology Appointment 24/7 Neuro Emergency Support Call Now FAQ 1. What symptoms require seeing a neurologist? You should see a neurologist if you experience persistent headaches, seizures, dizziness, numbness, weakness, memory loss, tremors, or difficulty with speech, vision, or balance. These symptoms may indicate underlying brain, nerve, or spinal disorders that need timely evaluation. 2. What does a neurologist treat? A neurologist diagnoses and treats conditions affecting the brain, spine, and nerves, including stroke, epilepsy, migraines, neuropathy, Parkinson’s disease, movement disorders, multiple sclerosis, and nerve compress
